offer_dpf.seo_title: DPF filter regeneration and cleaning machines | Motsler – workshop equipment
offer_dpf.seo_description: Professional machines for regenerating and cleaning DPF, FAP, GPF, SCR, and DOC filters. Explore our models and request a quote for your workshop.
offer_dpf.seo_keywords: DPF regeneration machine, DPF cleaning machines, DPF equipment, filter cleaning machine, DPF machine price
offer_dpf.hero_title: Professional machines for regenerating and cleaning DPF, FAP, GPF, SCR, and catalytic filters—faster, safer, and more effectively
offer_dpf.hero_subtitle: Motsler machines deliver full DPF filter regeneration and cleaning in one cycle, with no reconnecting between stages. Efficient, simple, and environmentally sound.
offer_dpf.hero_micro: Find out which machine fits your business best
offer_dpf.s1_p1: Poland’s leading manufacturer with many years of experience. Machines that work in small and large companies in Poland and worldwide.
offer_dpf.s1_p2: SWS and PFS technologies. Fast DPF filter cleaning, easy machine operation.
offer_dpf.s1_p3: Full parts availability plus a guarantee of fast, reliable service. Low energy costs.
offer_dpf.s2_c1_title: SWS system—full regeneration in one cycle
offer_dpf.s2_c1_text: The DPF filter does not need reconnecting between cleaning and drying stages. Faster, safer, and with less risk of mistakes.
offer_dpf.s2_c2_text: 4.8 m² of filtration surface allows cleaning around 100 DPF filters before a change is needed—saving cost and time, with lower environmental impact.
offer_dpf.s2_c3_text: The machine guides the operator step by step through full filter regeneration, reducing human error and maximizing throughput.
offer_dpf.s2_c4_text: A professional machine lets you handle more filters in less time, increasing revenue for your cleaning point or workshop.
offer_dpf.tech_heading: Technologies that set the standard for DPF filter regeneration
offer_dpf.tech_intro: Motsler machines are engineered for maximum effectiveness, safety, and ease of use. Our proprietary technology delivers throughput and process repeatability that off-the-shelf equipment typically cannot match.
offer_dpf.tech_c1_title: SWS system—full regeneration in one cycle
offer_dpf.tech_c1_desc: The SWS system removes the need to reconnect the DPF filter between cleaning and drying stages.
offer_dpf.tech_c1_benefit: Time savings, lower risk of operator error, and a simple, repeatable process.
offer_dpf.tech_c2_desc: Multi-stage filtration removes contaminants and allows the medium to be reused.
offer_dpf.tech_c2_benefit: Lower operating costs, stable cleaning quality, and a more sustainable setup.
offer_dpf.tech_c2_specs: 4.8 m² filtration surface; handles around 100 DPF filters before replacement.
offer_dpf.tech_c3_desc: The machine guides the operator step by step through the full filter regeneration process.
offer_dpf.tech_c3_benefit: Fewer operator mistakes, higher throughput, and straightforward operation.
offer_dpf.tech_c4_title: Full-depth cleaning of the filter structure
offer_dpf.tech_c4_desc: The system removes soot and ash from the entire filter structure—not only the surface.
offer_dpf.tech_c4_benefit: Maximum flow recovery, better vehicle performance, and longer filter life.
offer_dpf.tech_cta: See Motsler machine models and pick the right solution

offer_dpf.models_m2_throughput: Larger machine, one filter at a time, faster and more powerful

offer_dpf.models_m2_tech_2: PFS filtration—4.8 m², ~200 DPF filters before cartridge change

offer_dpf.models_m3_desc: Our top model for sites that clean or dry two filters at once—maximum throughput.

offer_dpf.models_m3_tech_4: Full-depth cleaning of the filter structure
offer_dpf.models_m3_tech_5: Simultaneous cleaning or drying of two filters
offer_dpf.proc_heading: DPF filter regeneration and cleaning—step by step
offer_dpf.proc_intro_p1: Motsler machines guide you through the full DPF filter regeneration cycle in one workflow. From measurement and diagnostics through complete cleaning to the final report—without reconnecting the filter, with maximum effectiveness and safety.
offer_dpf.proc_intro_p2: Every stage is tuned for throughput, repeatable results, and time savings at your DPF cleaning point or workshop.
offer_dpf.proc_highlight_label: Why the Motsler system stands out
offer_dpf.proc_highlight: SWS—one cycle with no filter reconnects, full-depth cleaning of the filter structure, and automated process control. Your DPF regeneration machine runs faster and more repeatably at the filter cleaning station, and DPF cleaning needs less operator time.
offer_dpf.proc_step_1_text: The machine automatically measures how contaminated the filter is—the first step for a professional DPF regeneration machine in a workshop or dedicated filter cleaning point.
offer_dpf.proc_step_2_text: DPF cleaning reaches the full filter structure, removing soot and ash. The SWS system runs the entire process without reconnecting the filter between stages.
offer_dpf.proc_step_3_text: DPF, FAP, or GPF filters are dried thoroughly while keeping safety and regeneration quality—essential before the post-clean measurement.
offer_dpf.proc_step_4_text: We repeat the measurement to confirm DPF cleaning performance and maximum flow recovery.
offer_dpf.proc_step_5_text: The machine prints a professional customer report at your filter cleaning point or workshop, documenting the process and outcomes of regeneration.
offer_dpf.benefits_heading: Motsler machines—an investment that pays off
offer_dpf.benefits_intro_p1: Whether you run a filter cleaning point, manage a vehicle fleet, or operate a workshop, Motsler machines help you grow revenue, save time, and stay ahead of the competition.
offer_dpf.benefits_intro_p2: Professional DPF regeneration and cleaning in one cycle is not only margin from the service itself—it also brings customers through your door and opens space for add-on workshop work.
offer_dpf.benefits_c1_text: More filters handled per day means higher turnover. One regeneration cycle means less operator effort and happier customers.
offer_dpf.benefits_c2_text: In-house cleaning for every company vehicle cuts outsourcing costs. A fast, repeatable process keeps the fleet moving with fewer standstills.
offer_dpf.benefits_c3_text: DPF cleaning draws customers to your bay. During the same visit you can offer oil changes, brake pads, or routine inspections.
offer_dpf.cmp_r1_motsler: No DPF filter reconnects between stages—a faster process
offer_dpf.cmp_r1_competitor: Operator must reconnect the filter—a slower process
offer_dpf.cmp_r2_motsler: 4.8 m² surface, ~100 DPF filters before change—lower operating cost
offer_dpf.cmp_r2_competitor: Basic or no filtration, more frequent changes
offer_dpf.cmp_r3_motsler: Yes—maximum effectiveness and minimum handling time
offer_dpf.cmp_r3_competitor: Not always available; often manual or one-way only
offer_dpf.cmp_r4_feature: Full-depth cleaning of the filter structure
offer_dpf.cmp_r4_motsler: Soot and ash removed throughout the structure—better filter performance
offer_dpf.cmp_r6_motsler: Higher and faster thanks to SWS and PFS—more filters in less time, lower running cost
offer_dpf.cmp_r6_competitor: Lower and slower—longer cycle times, higher operating cost
offer_dpf.cmp_summary: Motsler leads with a faster, more efficient workflow via SWS, higher throughput and lower cost via PFS, bidirectional automated cleaning, and DUAL for running two filters in parallel.
offer_dpf.cmp_cta: See Motsler models and maximize profit in your business
offer_dpf.s3_intro: SLR Premium and SLR Premium Plus address real service scenarios: from initial measurement through cleaning and drying to a final report—in one automated workflow.
offer_dpf.s3_feature_3: quick filter connection in about 1 minute
offer_dpf.s3_feature_5: 4 fully automated stages: initial measurement, cleaning, drying, final measurement and report printout
offer_dpf.s3_feature_6: 15 minutes of training and you work on the machine independently
offer_dpf.s3_feature_7: all DPF, FAP, GPF types, SCR catalysts, Euro 6, trucks, EGR coolers and much more
offer_dpf.s3_sws_desc: The single-line (SWS) layout simplifies hydraulics and reduces the number of wear-prone components. Medium flow stays stable and service is easier to plan—fewer unplanned stops and more predictable machine performance under daily load.
offer_dpf.s3_pfs_desc: PFS filters water in a closed loop: two reusable stainless steel pre-filters plus a main 10-micron filter with 25 m² surface area—high throughput with consistent medium cleanliness. Typical main filter replacement after 60–100 DPF filters, for predictable operating costs.
offer_dpf.s3_materials: Stainless steel construction and components from reputable European suppliers—selected to combine durability, parts availability, and safe operation for years to come.
offer_dpf.s3_service: Spare parts within 48 hours and 24-hour service support.
offer_dpf.s4_lead: The process combines a closed loop, water filtration, cavitation, and turbulent flow with DPF chemistry. From the first measurement through cleaning and drying to final documentation—in one repeatable cycle.
offer_dpf.s4_step_1: Closed loop — medium control and repeatable operation
offer_dpf.s4_step_2: Water filtration in the working circuit
offer_dpf.s4_step_4: Turbulent flow and dedicated DPF chemistry
offer_dpf.s4_step_5: Initial measurement — baseline for the report
offer_dpf.s41_body: We show measurement photos, cleaned filters (passenger and Euro 6), and printer output before and after—clear, measurable results. Plus a video of regenerating a heavily soot-loaded filter.
offer_dpf.s41_video_placeholder: Video coming soon — we will add regeneration footage
offer_dpf.s5_opinions_sub: What operators say about our machines
offer_dpf.s5_t1_quote: We have been using a DPF SLR Premium machine tailored to our requirements for several months. Ordering, delivery, and commissioning went smoothly. In daily use the machine does its job perfectly—I can recommend MOTSLER Sp. z o.o. in Rzeszów as a competent, reliable partner.
offer_dpf.s5_t2_quote: We needed an efficient, environmentally friendly DPF cleaning machine. Motsler’s machine met all expectations—effective soot removal with minimal water and chemicals, plus professional support and training. Highly recommended.
offer_dpf.s5_t3_quote: After months of market research, MOTSLER stood out. Cleaning is fast and effective, filters come back like new. Cooperation is flawless—true professionalism and deep expertise.
offer_dpf.s5_map_lead: Visit us in Rzeszów—training, spare parts pickup, and service support.
offer_dpf.s6_title: Invest and gain: time, peace of mind, and money
offer_dpf.s6_lead: When you buy a Motsler SLR Premium machine, you gain:
offer_dpf.s6_b1: time — no more days lost outsourcing filters. On your line the job takes about an hour; elsewhere it can take two days.
offer_dpf.s6_b2: money — fees you used to pay subcontractors stay in your pocket.
offer_dpf.s6_b3: extra revenue — you clean filters in-house for customers who do not own a machine.
offer_dpf.s6_b4: upsell opportunities — oil service, A/C, mechanical work while the car is in for DPF.
offer_dpf.s6_b5: for fleets: less downtime because regeneration happens on your premises, on your schedule.
offer_dpf.s6_b6: stronger customer loyalty — a broader, integrated offer brings clients back more often.
offer_dpf.s6_b7: full startup support and on-site training at your workshop — no need to travel for basic training.
offer_dpf.s6_cta: Request a quote or contact us
offer_dpf.s9_subtitle: How MOTSLER customers use the machines in practice — context, decision, and outcome.
offer_dpf.s9_cs1_body: A second machine on the shop floor: the older unit had served for years, but the new line boosts throughput—more filters in less time, a faster cleaning cycle, and shorter customer wait times. Result: more jobs, higher rotation, and stronger revenue.
offer_dpf.s9_cs2_body: An owned fleet used to mean external cleaning—extra cost and vehicle downtime. An in-house station cuts logistics, shortens idle time, and keeps money in the business.
offer_dpf.s9_cs3_body: DPF regeneration as an add-on. Sending filters out used to eat margin and time. Bringing the process in-house keeps service value at the workshop.
offer_dpf.s9_cs4_body: A typical international scenario: adding regeneration next to an existing workshop—complementary service lines and higher revenue from a broader offer.
offer_dpf.s10_b1: 12 months warranty with optional extension to 24 months.
offer_dpf.s10_b2: Fast technical support by phone, WhatsApp, Messenger, and e-mail—response within 24 hours.
offer_dpf.s10_b3: Parts availability: about 24 hours in Poland, about 48 hours in Europe—components from leading EU suppliers.
offer_dpf.s10_b4: Operator training and certificates documenting qualifications.
offer_dpf.s12_title: Want a price or a live demo?
offer_dpf.s12_subtitle: Send your request and receive an offer
offer_dpf.s13_body: Hi — I’m Sebastian. I have worked on DPF topics since 2018, building know-how in machine manufacturing and DPF cleaning. I have trained more than 1,000 people in Poland and across Europe and personally delivered over 30 machines continent-wide. I keep listening to customers and the issues they face with DPF as a business and with their equipment. I continuously develop MOTSLER products and implement solutions that help with everyday machine operation. I also build bespoke machines for customers who need individual answers. Whenever possible, I travel to commission and start machines on site, running professional training on operation and DPF cleaning. From time to time I visit our customers and competitors to ask what could be improved in the machines to make operation or the cleaning process even smoother. That is how we build machines that match real needs — including projects other manufacturers will not take on. If you want a premium-class machine in your workshop, call me — I will deliver equipment you can rely on.
